blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No Converted leads available and read-only mode prevented mutating lead status to validate conditional Convert to Case button visibility.
Could not execute Convert to Case prefill flow because no Converted leads existed and status controls were disabled in read-only mode.
End-to-end converted lead to case flow blocked by missing Converted leads and read-only controls preventing conversion setup.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser section defining isolation, evidence, and safety boundaries for concurrent browser validators.
